title: Golden State Warriors vs Cleveland Cavaliers Finals Game 3
snippet: Kevin Durant exploded for 43 points as the Warriors take a commanding 3-0 series lead and push the Cavaliers to the brink with a 11-102 win.

title: The 2018 NBA Finals Game 3: Warriors Vs. Cavaliers Journey
snippet: Ultimately, the Cavaliers, playing with sheer grit and determination, managed to secure a victory, making the final score 110-102.
